title: Release Inbox Triage
description: Triage release-related inbox items, isolate today-critical threads, and draft one concise status sync.

deliverables.description: Structured triage result for release-related email threads.
A concise status sync email covering only the today-critical items.

execution.command: Triage the release mailbox export, identify the items that require action today, and produce the structured triage plus the status sync draft.
